mapper.insert: INSERT INTO houses ( host_id, name, address, price, max_guests, description, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{hostId}, #{name}, #{address}, #{price}, #{maxGuests}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT house_id AS houseId, host_id AS hostId, name, address, price, max_guests AS maxGuests, description, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM houses WHERE house_id = #{houseId}

SELECT house_id AS houseId, host_id AS hostId, name, address, price, max_guests AS maxGuests, description, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM houses WHERE host_id = #{hostId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE houses SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, price = #{price}, max_guests = #{maxGuests}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE house_id = #{houseId}
mapper.select: SELECT reservation_id AS reservationId, guest_id AS guestId, house_id AS houseId, status, checkin_date AS checkinDate, checkout_date AS checkoutDate, total_price AS totalPrice, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM reservations WHERE house_id = #{houseId}

SELECT house_id AS houseId, host_id AS hostId, name, address, price, max_guests AS maxGuests, description, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM houses WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE houses SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE house_id = #{houseId}
mapper.sql:
FROM houses h WHERE h.status = 'APPROVED'
AND h.max_guests >= #{numberOfGuests}
AND h.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{location}, '%')
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reservations r WHERE r.house_id = h.house_id AND r.status != 'CANCELLED' AND (r.checkin_date < #{endDate} AND r.checkout_date > #{startDate}) )
mapper.select:
SELECT h.house_id AS houseId, h.host_id AS hostId, h.name, h.address, h.price, h.max_guests AS maxGuests, h.description, h.status AS status, h.created_at AS createdAt, h.updated_at AS updatedAt
ORDER BY h.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
